steps.title: Identify the defining claim about replica materials
steps.content: The notes establish that contemporary shipbuilders use “a mix of modern and traditional materials” and that “most of the materials used are traditional.” This balance between traditional and modern is the key information the student must generalize from.

steps.title: Evaluate which choice generalizes this balance
steps.content:
C directly generalizes the material composition: most materials are traditional, some modern.

A focuses on a single traditional material (coconut palm fiber rope) rather than making a broad claim about all materials; B and D ignore replica materials entirely, discussing the ancient dhow's features or contemporary builders instead.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
